title: Junior Frontend Developer at IBM India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at IBM India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at IBM India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IBM India International Enterprises:
IBM India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India International Enterprises!
